message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 登陆流程图

actor User
participant "Client" as Client
participant "OpenLDAP" as OpenLDAP
participant "ActiveDirectory" as ActiveDirectory

User -> Client: 1 请求登陆服务器(邮箱，密码)
activate Client
Client -> OpenLDAP: 2 验证用户
activate OpenLDAP
OpenLDAP -> ActiveDirectory: 3 验证用户
activate ActiveDirectory
ActiveDirectory --> OpenLDAP: 4 返回验证结果
deactivate ActiveDirectory
OpenLDAP --> Client: 5 返回组信息，sudo 信息等
deactivate OpenLDAP
deactivate Client
User -> Client: 6 用户登录 Client
activate Client
deactivate Client

@enduml
```
